title: Land Registry Commercial Voids as Neighbourhood Demand Signal (Retail)
summary: CCOD service page reachable but download link not detected

evidence.claim: HMLR CCOD service page exists and exposes monthly download

        Use land and property data

    <link rel="mask-icon" href="/assets/images/govuk-mask-icon.svg" color="#0b0... [truncated; full body sha256=8f88eeb047cf9b591613b6e26f224249ae9344b6f9d5aeffc5fd4d9fa9fcaa59]

evidence.reason: all 1 sources reachable; data shape consistent with claim

notes: CCOD is the canonical UK source for commercial property ownership; published monthly under OGL.
Promoting this insight to PROVEN requires (a) downloading a CCOD snapshot and (b) joining with LA empty-property datasets — both feasible but out of scope for first PR.
Documented as a follow-up rather than a blocker.
